titleStmt.title: SII 29.315: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 315. (A.R. No. B. 596 of 1961-62.) MĀNVI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 6) built into the wall of the well called Jēḍara-bāvi.

In addition to the information as in No. 325 below the present record states that Timmaya belonged to Mānuve [the present Mānvi] and was pēṭhegavuḍa of Narasapura. Also it refers to a grant inam given to the person for the work of constructing the well.

It is dated Śaka 1529, Plavaṅga, Śrāvaṇa, śu [15]. It corresponds to 1607 A.D., July 28, Tuesday. On the basis of this date the cyclic year Krōdhi of the five records [Nos. 325-329] may be equated with Śaka 1526 and the given tithi their corresponds to 1604 A.D., September 1, Saturday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
1529 neya plavaṁganāma saṁvatsarada śrā
su 15 mānuveya narasāpura peṭhegavuḍa
dupada tiṁmaya kaṭisida bāvi Aṁbāraka
na baḷike śiśyanige mudala baniyi cukke bhā
ga sōnāpura yibāvi muṁde hosa sile
napura yibāvi kaṭuva nivitya pālista 1
yināma koṭu Ade yi saṁvatsaradali sā
śana kaṭitu śrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.315 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
